name: Fight Scenes
description: Cinematic fight, combat, and martial-arts action prompts. Vibe-style template: structured choreography (hook → exchanges → escalation → climax → resolution), specific moves (jab/cross/roundhouse/parry, blade work, elemental magic), active-participant camera (whip-pan, dolly, orbit, snap zoom), and impact effects (dust, sparks, shockwaves, fabric ripple). 9:16 social-cut by default; 5-15s clips. Reference is optional — use only when reproducing a real fighter, real choreography, or a copyrighted franchise look.

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter — single-shot stills of the apex pose (mid-strike, blade clash, ground slam) used as i2v anchors. Multi-ref accepted when the user supplies fighter likeness or arena reference.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter for default action; google/veo-3.1 via OpenRouter for higher-fidelity choreography (longer takes, multi-fighter spacing). 5s clips, generate_audio: false. Pick veo when prompt has 3+ exchanges in one shot.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — optional. Used only for narrator-led fight breakdowns or hero one-liners, not for in-fight dialogue (avoid mid-action speech).
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1; HormoziCaptions for hype/breakdown overlay style; KaraokeCaptions for narrator commentary. Many fight cuts ship caption-free.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single high-tension cue (taiko + strings, orchestral percussion, or industrial pulse). One music_v1 call, ducked under impact SFX. SFX layer is mandatory: blade rings, body thumps, shockwave booms, blade-whistle on swings.

constants.structure: 2s hook → exchange-1 → exchange-2 → escalation → climax → resolution
constants.cameraDoctrine: camera-as-combatant (push on aggression, pull on grapple, orbit on deadlock, whip-pan on chaos)
constants.soundDoctrine: pre-impact silence + sharp foley + ducked music

variationAxes: discipline (kung-fu, karate, muay-thai, capoeira, mma, taekwondo, judo)
weapon (unarmed, katana, dual-blades, spear, staff, whip, gun-fu)
environment (rain courtyard, bamboo grove, neon alley, rooftop, gladiator arena, frozen lake, burning interior)
scale (1v1 duel, 2v1 flanking, wave attacks, group melee)
tempo (deliberate samurai stillness vs explosive MMA scramble)
doNotCopyLiterally: Choreography beats, fighter names, exact arenas, and named franchises. Vibe and structure only — never reproduce a copyrighted character or real martial artist without an explicit reference and reference-required consent.
referenceNotes: Optional. Required only if the user names a real fighter, a real franchise character (Goku, John Wick, etc.), or wants a specific gym/dojo look. In those cases the AGENTS.md hard rule #3 reference gate applies — refuse without uploaded reference. Generic 'samurai duel' or 'rooftop brawl' needs no reference.
